title: AANA Support Domain Owner Signoff

scope.pilot_phase_boundary: Required before advisory mode promotion and before any enforced support phase.
scope.production_boundary: Required again with live connector evidence before production use.

production_claim: not production-approved by this repository artifact

required_signoff_areas.title: Refund Policy Interpretation
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve how support adapters interpret refund eligibility, refund timelines, exceptions, and unsupported refund promises.
evidence_required: sample accepted and blocked refund replies
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Fixture policy text does not prove the current live refund policy or exception handling.

required_signoff_areas.title: Verification Requirements
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve when the guardrail must ask for secure verification instead of answering with account, order, billing, or payment facts.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Live identity and account verification behavior depends on deployment-specific systems.

required_signoff_areas.title: Escalation Paths
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve queues and handoff paths for refund exceptions, legal/regulatory requests, account closure/deletion, identity uncertainty, policy ambiguity, and high-value customer escalation.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: The repo declares queue shape only; staffed reviewer coverage is external.

required_signoff_areas.title: Safe Response Language
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve safe response language for revise, ask, defer, and refuse routes, including uncertainty language and secure verification wording.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Safe-response text may need localization, brand, legal, and accessibility review.

required_signoff_areas.title: Human Review Triggers
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve trigger mapping for refund exceptions, payment/billing data exposure, internal fraud or risk note exposure, legal/regulatory requests, account closure/deletion, identity uncertainty, policy ambiguity, hard blockers, and defer routes.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Trigger precision must be calibrated against live support volume before enforcement expansion.

required_signoff_areas.title: Audit Retention
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve retention period, immutable storage, deletion/legal hold, access controls, and reviewer access for metadata-only audit records.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Repo-local JSONL checks do not create immutable or compliant production retention.

required_signoff_areas.title: Customer-Facing Language Boundaries
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve boundaries for customer-visible claims, tone, uncertainty, refund promises, billing statements, and internal-policy disclosure.
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Brand, legal, and regional language constraints may require additional owner review.

required_signoff_areas.title: Allowed Automation Scope
required_signoff_areas.review_scope: Approve exactly which support workflows may run in shadow, advisory, and enforced modes. Full autonomous enforcement is out of scope.
evidence_required: human approval path for irreversible actions
required_signoff_areas.residual_risk: Automation scope must be re-approved before any new adapter, connector, or enforcement phase is added.
